data.body: Investigation complete. ROOT_CAUSE: ticket-graph.py _write_link_event() writes LINK.json to disk without calling write_commit_event() from ticket-lib.sh, so no git add + git commit is performed after file creation — leaving LINK events as untracked files. Confidence: high. Fix: inline flock+git-add+git-commit in ticket-graph.py _write_link_event() matching ticket-link.sh pattern. Testing_mode: RED (need test confirming LINK events appear in git log after ticket link).
